datasets.title: Police enforcement fines
datasets.description: Cleaned monthly police enforcement records published by BITRE and the National Road Safety Data Hub.

hero.headline: How visible enforcement responds to risky road behaviour
hero.deck: This release tracks the scale and mix of fines, charges, and arrests across Australian jurisdictions, giving policy and research users a public-interest view of where enforcement is concentrated and how it is detected.

story_sections.title: National pattern
story_sections.summary: Start with the long-run national series, then move down into metric-specific and jurisdiction-specific pressure points.

story_sections.title: Enforcement mix
story_sections.summary: Separate police-issued and camera-led activity so users can distinguish behavioural monitoring from direct officer enforcement.

future_agent_notes: Append new datasets to this catalog instead of hardcoding cards in the UI.
Keep normalized field names aligned with the current cleaned JSON structure.
If a workbook introduces new metrics, update METRIC_LABELS and metric grouping rules.
planned_visuals: Long-run national trend with hoverable period values
Metric comparison showing where total actions are concentrated
Jurisdiction-by-metric matrix for identifying state and territory hotspots
Detection-method breakdown to compare police-issued and camera-led fines

datasets.title: Alcohol and drug tests
datasets.description: Scaffold for BITRE roadside alcohol and drug testing counts, rates, and supporting time-series visuals.

hero.headline: Testing volume is the first story, not just the positives
hero.deck: This tab is reserved for the test-volume dataset so future work can tell the compliance story before moving to detected offences.

story_sections.title: Testing coverage
story_sections.summary: Show how roadside testing activity changes over time and by jurisdiction.

story_sections.title: Licence-holder rates
story_sections.summary: Normalize test volumes so cross-jurisdiction comparisons are fairer.

planned_visuals: Trend line for annual alcohol and drug tests conducted
Jurisdiction ranking for tests per 10,000 licence holders
Narrative callout linking testing intensity to subsequent positive-rate datasets
future_agent_notes: Create a cleaner that preserves test volume and standardized licence-holder rates.
Link this tab narratively to the positive-breath and positive-drug tabs.

datasets.title: Positive breath tests
datasets.description: Scaffold for positive random breath test results and rates over time.

hero.headline: Positive rates tell a different story than raw testing volume
hero.deck: This tab should explain whether reductions in drink-driving positives reflect stronger deterrence, changing testing patterns, or both.

story_sections.title: Positivity rate
story_sections.summary: Plot the national trend in positive rates and call out breaks in pattern.

story_sections.title: Jurisdiction rate
story_sections.summary: Show per-licence-holder variation without losing the national picture.

planned_visuals: Dual-axis chart for tests conducted and positive-rate trend
Story note tying drink-driving enforcement to fatal-crash risk behaviour context
future_agent_notes: Keep percentage fields numeric and expose both counts and rates.
Support a chart pairing absolute positives with percentage positivity.

datasets.title: Positive drug tests
datasets.description: Scaffold for positive roadside drug testing outcomes and rate-based comparison.

hero.headline: Drug-driving detection needs its own narrative, not a footnote
hero.deck: This future tab is intended to explain how test volume, positive rates, and state variation have evolved as roadside drug testing expanded nationally.

story_sections.title: National drug-driving pattern
story_sections.summary: Explain the long rise in roadside drug testing and the recent decline in positivity rates.

story_sections.title: State outliers
story_sections.summary: Identify which jurisdictions report especially high or low positive rates per 10,000 licence holders.

planned_visuals: Trend line for positive drug test rate
Annotation band describing major shifts after 2020
future_agent_notes: Preserve both absolute counts and rates to support mixed charts.
Reuse shared tooltip and story-section components from the fines tab.

datasets.title: Data dictionary
datasets.description: Reference tab reserved for the official police enforcement data dictionary PDF.

hero.headline: Definitions, caveats, and reporting scope belong in the same experience
hero.deck: This tab is for glossary-level context so future users can inspect caveats, offence definitions, and collection notes without leaving the site.

story_sections.title: Definitions
story_sections.summary: Map enforcement terms to plain-language explanations and original source definitions.

story_sections.title: Limitations
story_sections.summary: Keep data consistency caveats visible beside every analytical story.

planned_visuals: No chart required; this tab should foreground searchable definitions and caveats
Cross-links back to dataset tabs where each term is used
future_agent_notes: When the PDF is added, provide deep links into the glossary and methodology sections.
Mirror key caveats in dataset-specific story footers.
